goal: Add HermesProxy.emit('sessionListRendered', containerEl) after the session list DOM is built in loadSessions()

details.location: Inside loadSessions() function, after all session items are appended to the DOM
details.notes: Must be after the DOM is fully populated but before the function returns. The containerEl is the #session-list element.

guard_focus: Does emit fire on every loadSessions call?
Is the DOM fully populated when emit fires?
Does it use HermesProxy.emit with try/catch wrapper already present in the codebase?
